/usr/bin/ar qc libproximalib.a CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/compiler/Compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/compiler/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/compiler/BuildRulesParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/lexer/Lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/lexer/Token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/parser/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/parser/AST.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/semantic/SemanticAnalyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/semantic/TypeChecker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/semantic/SymbolTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/semantic/ArgumentValidator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/codegen/LLVMCodeGen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/codegen/Optimizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/runtime/Runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/runtime/Debugger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/runtime/Interpreter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/runtime/Profiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/runtime/REPL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/runtime/StoryManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/runtime/gem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/stdlib/IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/stdlib/Math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/stdlib/Collection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/stdlib/Time.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/stdlib/StdLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/utils/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/utils/Protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/utils/DocGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/utils/CollectionParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/services/llm/LLMClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/services/GitIntegration/GitIntegration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proximalib.dir/src/core/AutoSave.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libproximalib.a
